## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (no type errors)
- [ ] No hardcoded URLs, credentials, or personal data added
- [ ] No commercial assets added (fonts, images requiring a license)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] `docs/DATA_MODEL.md` updated if Firestore schema changed
- [ ] UI changes include a screenshot or screen recording
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff — no debug code, console.logs, or TODO comments left in
